title: DIGITAL ELECTRICAL MULTIMETER AC/DC H2 TESTING
features: 7 Functions and 19 Ranges to cover AC/DC voltage
Two 23" Test leads, low battery indicator
Diode and fuse protected super sensitive meter
Check below for what it tests
description: DIGITAL ELECTRICAL MULTIMETER AC/DC H2 TESTING 7 FUNCTIONS AND 19 RANGES TO COVER AC/DC VOLTAGE, RESISTANCE, DC AMPS BATTERY, DIODE AND SIGNAL H2 TESTING. TWO 23" TEST LEADS, LOW BATTERY INDICATOR. DIODE AND FUSE PROTECTED SUPER SENSITIVE METER. TESTS DECIBEL RATIOS, DIODES, TRANSISTOR AND CONTINUITY. TESTS AC-V: 0-200-750V BATTERY: 9V-1.5V DC-V: 0-200MV-2000MV-20MV-200V-1000V DC-A; 0-2000uA-20mA-200mA-10A RESISTANCE: 0-200-2000-20K-200K-2000K BATTERIES INCLUDED. this item is brand NEW and is retail packaged!!!!!!
